function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
  d."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
  SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS total_cost,
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
  CASE WHEN SUM(s."Sales Amount") = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount") END AS gross_margin_pct,
  COUNT(s."SalesOrderLineKey") AS total_order_lines
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
GROUP BY d."Fiscal Year"
ORDER BY d."Fiscal Year" ASC;"}

questionLabel: [Q2][hard] Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH channel_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        so."Channel" AS "Channel",
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS total_orders,
        COUNT(*) AS order_lines,
        AVG(s."Sales Amount") AS avg_line_amount,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_margin
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    GROUP BY so."Channel"
),
all_revenue AS (
    SELECT SUM(total_revenue) AS total_revenue_all FROM channel_sales
)
SELECT 
    cs."Channel",
    cs.total_revenue,
    ROUND(100.0 * cs.total_revenue / ar.total_revenue_all, 2) AS revenue_share_pct,
    cs.total_orders,
    cs.order_lines,
    ROUND(cs.avg_line_amount, 2) AS avg_line_amount,
    ROUND(100.0 * cs.gross_margin / cs.total_revenue, 2) AS gross_margin_pct
FROM channel_sales cs
CROSS JOIN all_revenue ar
ORDER BY cs.total_revenue DESC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    p."Product" AS Product,
    p."Category" AS Category,
    p."Subcategory" AS Subcategory,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,

JOIN 
    "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY 
    p."Product", p."Category", p."Subcategory"
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;"}

{"sql":"SELECT 
  c."Customer" AS Customer,
  c."City" AS City,

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH revenue_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        so."Channel", 
        p."Category", 
        d."Fiscal Year" AS fiscal_year, 
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
    GROUP BY so."Channel", p."Category", d."Fiscal Year"
)
SELECT 
    curr."Channel", 
    curr."Category", 
    prev.fiscal_year AS prior_year, 
    prev.revenue AS prior_revenue, 
    curr.fiscal_year AS current_year, 
    curr.revenue AS current_revenue, 
    CASE WHEN prev.revenue = 0 OR prev.revenue IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(100.0 * (curr.revenue - prev.revenue) / prev.revenue, 2) END AS yoy_growth_pct
FROM revenue_by_year curr
LEFT JOIN revenue_by_year prev
    ON curr."Channel" = prev."Channel"
    AND curr."Category" = prev."Category"
    AND CAST(curr.fiscal_year AS INTEGER) = CAST(prev.fiscal_year AS INTEGER) + 1
ORDER BY curr."Channel", curr."Category", prev.fiscal_year ASC;"}

questionText: Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. questionLabel: [Q21][hard] Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
  so."Channel" AS Channel,
  p."Category" AS Category,
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
  SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(s."Order Quantity"), 0) AS revenue_per_unit,
  AVG(p."List Price") AS avg_list_price,
  (1 - (SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(s."Order Quantity") * AVG(p."List Price"), 0))) * 100 AS realized_discount_pct,
  SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
  (SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(s."Sales Amount"), 0)) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM 
  "Sales" s
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY 
  so."Channel", p."Category"
ORDER BY 
  so."Channel" ASC, total_revenue DESC;"}

Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH revenue_by_quarter AS (
    SELECT 
        so."Channel",
        p."Category",
        d."Fiscal Quarter" AS quarter,
        d."Fiscal Year" AS year,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
    GROUP BY so."Channel", p."Category", d."Fiscal Year", d."Fiscal Quarter"
),
revenue_with_lag AS (
    SELECT
        r1."Channel",
        r1."Category",
        r1.year AS current_year,
        r1.quarter AS current_quarter,
        r1.revenue AS current_revenue,
        r2.year AS prior_year,
        r2.quarter AS prior_quarter,
        r2.revenue AS prior_revenue
    FROM revenue_by_quarter r1
    LEFT JOIN revenue_by_quarter r2
      ON r1."Channel" = r2."Channel"
      AND r1."Category" = r2."Category"
      AND (
        (r1.year = r2.year AND r1.quarter = CAST(CAST(r2.quarter AS INTEGER) + 1 AS VARCHAR))
        OR (CAST(r1.year AS INTEGER) = CAST(r2.year AS INTEGER) + 1 AND r1.quarter = 'Q1' AND r2.quarter = 'Q4')
      )
)
SELECT 
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    prior_quarter,
    prior_revenue,
    current_quarter,
    current_revenue,
    CASE WHEN prior_revenue IS NOT NULL AND prior_revenue != 0 THEN 
        ROUND((current_revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue * 100, 2)
    ELSE NULL END AS qoq_growth_pct
FROM revenue_with_lag
WHERE prior_revenue IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "Channel", "Category", prior_quarter ASC;"}

questionLabel: [Q23][hard] For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH category_subcat_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        p."Category",
        p."Subcategory",
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
        SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
    GROUP BY p."Category", p."Subcategory"
),
category_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        "Category",
        SUM(revenue) AS category_revenue
    FROM category_subcat_stats
    GROUP BY "Category"
),
ranked_subcats AS (
    SELECT 
        css."Category",
        css."Subcategory",
        css.revenue,
        css.units_sold,
        css.gross_profit,
        ct.category_revenue,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY css."Category" ORDER BY css.revenue DESC, css."Subcategory" ASC) AS revenue_rank
    FROM category_subcat_stats css
    JOIN category_totals ct ON css."Category" = ct."Category"
)
SELECT 
    "Category",
    revenue_rank,
    "Subcategory",
    revenue,
    units_sold,
    gross_profit,
    ROUND(100.0 * revenue / category_revenue, 2) AS category_revenue_share_pct
FROM ranked_subcats
WHERE revenue_rank <= 2
ORDER BY "Category" ASC, revenue_rank ASC, "Subcategory" ASC;"}

questionText: Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.
questionLabel: [Q24][hard] Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH channel_category_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
        so."Channel",
        p."Category",
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS orders,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    GROUP BY so."Channel", p."Category"
),
channel_total_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
        "Channel",
        SUM(revenue) AS channel_total_revenue
    FROM channel_category_revenue
    GROUP BY "Channel"
),
revenue_with_share AS (
    SELECT 
        ccr.*,
        ctr.channel_total_revenue,
        ccr.revenue / ctr.channel_total_revenue * 100 AS channel_revenue_share_pct
    FROM channel_category_revenue ccr
    JOIN channel_total_revenue ctr ON ccr."Channel" = ctr."Channel"
)
SELECT 
    rws."Channel",
    rws."Category",
    rws.revenue,
    rws.channel_revenue_share_pct,
    SUM(rws.channel_revenue_share_pct) OVER (PARTITION BY rws."Channel" ORDER BY rws.revenue DESC, rws."Category" ASC) AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct,
    rws.orders,
    rws.gross_profit
FROM revenue_with_share rws
ORDER BY rws."Channel" ASC, rws.revenue DESC, rws."Category" ASC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH channel_revenue_cte AS (
    SELECT 
        st."Group",
        d."Fiscal Year",
        so."Channel" AS top_channel,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Sales_Territory" st ON s."SalesTerritoryKey" = st."SalesTerritoryKey"
    JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    GROUP BY st."Group", d."Fiscal Year", so."Channel"
),
group_year_revenue_cte AS (
    SELECT 
        "Group",
        "Fiscal Year",
        SUM(channel_revenue) AS group_year_revenue
    FROM channel_revenue_cte
    GROUP BY "Group", "Fiscal Year"
),
top_channel_cte AS (
    SELECT 
        c."Group",
        c."Fiscal Year",
        c.top_channel,
        c.channel_revenue,
        g.group_year_revenue,
        100.0 * c.channel_revenue / g.group_year_revenue AS channel_revenue_share_pct,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c."Group", c."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY c.channel_revenue DESC) AS rn
    FROM channel_revenue_cte c
    JOIN group_year_revenue_cte g
      ON c."Group" = g."Group" AND c."Fiscal Year" = g."Fiscal Year"
)
SELECT 
    "Group",
    "Fiscal Year",
    top_channel,
    channel_revenue,
    group_year_revenue,
    channel_revenue_share_pct
FROM top_channel_cte
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY "Group", "Fiscal Year" ASC;"}
